title: Walk-in Drive Production Engineer at Vedanta

jsonLd.title: Walk-in Drive Production Engineer at Vedanta
jsonLd.description:
Vedanta is actively seeking a talented and motivated Production Engineer to join our dynamic team in Visakhapatnam. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Vedanta:
Vedanta is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Implement lean manufacturing and continuous improvement initiatives
• Ensure environmental compliance and waste management
• Monitor equipment performance and coordinate preventive maintenance
• Prepare production cost analysis and efficiency reports
• Maintain accurate production records and prepare daily reports
• Coordinate with logistics for dispatching finished goods
• Coordinate with design and engineering teams on product improvements

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Lean Manufacturing
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in Kaizen
• Proficiency in GD&T
• Proficiency in ISO 9001
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in APQP
• Proficiency in TPM

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Referral bonus program
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Visakhapatnam, Andhra Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Vedanta!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
